## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion between JP Morgan and GrowthX to explore banking solutions and build a potential partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [JPM presented two primary options for GrowthX's liquidity management: (1) Operating account + high-yield savings, (2) Operating account + Certificate of Deposit (CD)](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [GrowthX currently uses Mercury, offering 4.05-4.4% yield (minus 25bps fee); JPM's proposed yields are lower but emphasize stability and long-term partnership](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=1021.0)
  - [JPM highlighted their broader service offerings, including dedicated support, VC connections, and integrated bill payment solutions](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [GrowthX expressed interest but wants to explore options with other major banks before deciding](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)

## Topics

### Current Banking Situation

  - [GrowthX currently uses Mercury for banking](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Earning 4.05-4.4% yield (minus 25bps management fee)](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Easy access to funds, but concerns about long-term viability as company grows](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

### JPM Liquidity Proposals

  - [Option 1: $1M in operating account, $11M in savings at 3.6% yield](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=437.0)
  - [Option 2: $1.5M in operating account, $10.5M in 3-month CD at 3.95% yield](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Potential hybrid approach discussed, combining elements of both options](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=1487.0)

### JPM Value Proposition

  - [Fortress balance sheet for stability during market turbulence](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=726.0)
  - [Scalable solutions as GrowthX grows (e.g., transition to Access platform)](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
  - [Dedicated support team and relationship managers](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=1801.0)
  - [Connections to VC ecosystem and capital raising expertise](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=962.0)
  - [Integrated bill payment solution (Cash Flow 360) at no additional cost](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)

### Risk and Access Considerations

  - [FDIC insurance limited to $250k, but JPM emphasizes overall bank stability](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=812.0)
  - [CD option restricts access to funds for 3 months; early withdrawal incurs fees](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [Savings account option provides more flexibility but at lower yield](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)

### GrowthX's Concerns

  - [Lower yield compared to current Mercury offering](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
  - [Potential complexity in managing CDs and rollovers](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Desire for easy access to funds for potential opportunities (e.g., acquisitions)](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=1666.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to internally discuss JPM's proposals and overall value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
  - [GrowthX plans to explore options with other major banks for comparison](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=1900.0)
  - [GrowthX to consider long-term banking needs and potential for outgrowing current solution](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=1908.0)
  - [JPM team remains available for further discussions and clarifications](https://fathom.video/share/tTiTsoP7Y694n85MzDxb8xFyobb1qsY3?tab=summary&timestamp=1929.0)
